name: @maker/gui
description: Maker's GUI: a Tauri shell + web UI, thin client over @maker/engine. Pure core tested; live build needs the Rust/Tauri toolchain.

scripts.tauri:dev: echo "needs-user: install Rust + Tauri CLI, then: cargo tauri dev"
scripts.tauri:build: echo "needs-user: install Rust + Tauri CLI, then: cargo tauri build"
